mapper.select:
SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar, email, account FROM
WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar, email, account FROM
WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND email LIKE CONCAT (#{email}) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, phone, password, nickname, avatar, email, account FROM
WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND account = #{account} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, is_deleted FROM
WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1

SELECT C.id appId,C.name appName, E.id userId,E.nickname,E.email,A.tenant_id tenantId,D.name tenantName FROM `md_user_tenant_role` A LEFT JOIN `md_role` B ON A.role_id=B.id LEFT JOIN `md_app` C ON A.app_id=C.id LEFT JOIN `md_tenant` D ON A.tenant_id=D.id LEFT JOIN md_user E ON A.user_id=E.id where E.id is not null AND B.status=1
AND ( E.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ((E.email like LOWER(concat('%',#{keyword},'%')) OR E.email like UPPER(concat('%',#{keyword},'%')))) OR LOWER(E.nickname) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY A.app_id,A.tenant_id,A.user_id
SELECT app.name FROM md_app_member ma JOIN md_app app ON ma.app_id = app.id WHERE ma.user_id = #{id} GROUP BY app.id

SELECT mu.phone, mu.nickname, mu.create_time, mu.email FROM md_user mu JOIN md_user_org rg ON mu.id = rg.user_id AND mu.is_deleted = 0 JOIN md_role mr ON mr.status = 0 AND rg.role_id = mr.id WHERE rg.org_id in
#{orgId}
AND (BINARY mu.phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%'))
AND (BINARY mu.nickname like concat('%',#{name},'%'))
GROUP BY mu.id
